scripts.dev:infra: bash -lc 'docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.infra.yml -f docker/docker-compose.dev-ports.yml -p shipsec up -d && pm2 startOrReload pm2.config.cjs --only shipsec-frontend,shipsec-backend,shipsec-worker --time'
scripts.dev:stack: bun run dev:infra && pm2 logs shipsec-frontend
scripts.dev:stack:stop: bash -lc 'pm2 delete shipsec-frontend shipsec-backend shipsec-worker || true && docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.infra.yml -f docker/docker-compose.dev-ports.yml -p shipsec down'
scripts.test:e2e: bash -lc 'SHIPSEC_INSTANCE=${SHIPSEC_INSTANCE:-$(./scripts/active-instance.sh get)} RUN_E2E=true bun test --force-exit e2e-tests'
scripts.test:e2e:core: bash -lc 'SHIPSEC_INSTANCE=${SHIPSEC_INSTANCE:-$(./scripts/active-instance.sh get)} RUN_E2E=true bun test --force-exit e2e-tests/core'
scripts.test:e2e:pipeline: bash -lc 'SHIPSEC_INSTANCE=${SHIPSEC_INSTANCE:-$(./scripts/active-instance.sh get)} RUN_E2E=true bun test --force-exit e2e-tests/pipeline'
scripts.test:e2e:cloud: bash -lc 'SHIPSEC_INSTANCE=${SHIPSEC_INSTANCE:-$(./scripts/active-instance.sh get)} RUN_E2E=true RUN_CLOUD_E2E=true bun test --force-exit e2e-tests/cloud'
scripts.lint: bun run lint:frontend && bun run lint:backend && bun run lint:worker
scripts.lint:fix: bun run lint:frontend --fix && bun run lint:backend --fix && bun run lint:worker --fix
